# resend_domain (Resource)

Manages a Resend domain.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "resend_domain" "example" {
  name   = "mail.example.com"
  region = "us-east-1"

  open_tracking  = true
  click_tracking = true
  tls            = "enforced"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The domain name.

### Optional

- `click_tracking` (Boolean) Whether click tracking is enabled.
- `custom_return_path` (String) The custom return path for the domain.
- `open_tracking` (Boolean) Whether open tracking is enabled.
- `region` (String) The region where the domain is hosted. Valid values: `us-east-1`, `eu-west-1`, `sa-east-1`, `ap-northeast-1`. Defaults to `us-east-1`.
- `tls` (String) The TLS setting. Valid values: `enforced`, `opportunistic`. Defaults to `opportunistic`.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the domain was created.
- `id` (String) The domain ID.
- `records` (Attributes List) DNS records required for domain verification. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--records))
- `status` (String) The verification status of the domain.

<a id="nestedatt--records"></a>
### Nested Schema for `records`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)
- `priority` (String)
- `record` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `ttl` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `value` (String)
